originalTitle: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3 - Welcome to West City Trailer
content: Step into West City in AGE 1000 and gear up for your next big adventure. Watch the latest DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3 footage and prepare for the ultimate battle experience. #DBXV3 launches on PlayStation 5, XBOX Series X|S, and Steam in 2027. Dive into the newest look at DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3, packed with fresh story details and the first-ever gameplay reveals. As you step into life as both a Great Saiya Squad and a West City University student, a new era of battles and choices unfolds. Stay tuned for more updates. Follow Bandai Namco Entertainment: X (Twitter): https://twitter.com/BandaiNamcoUS TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@bandainamcous Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bandainamcous Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BandaiNamcoUS Twitch: http://www.twitch.tv/bandainamcous Threads: https://www.threads.com/@bandainamcous Sign up for our newsletter! - https://www.bandainamcoent.com/#signup
chineseSummary: 万代南梦宫娱乐美国 · 510,123 次浏览
chineseContent: 在 AGE 1000 中走进西城，为你的下一次大冒险做好准备。观看最新的《龙珠异界 3》片段，为终极战斗体验做好准备。 #DBXV3 将于 2027 年在 PlayStation 5、XBOX Series X|S 和 Steam 上发布。深入了解 DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3 的最新外观，其中充满了新鲜的故事细节和前所未有的游戏玩法。当你以伟大赛亚小队和西城大学学生的身份步入生活时，一个充满战斗和选择的新时代即将展开。请继续关注更多更新。关注 Bandai Namco Entertainment：X (Twitter)：https://twitter.com/BandaiNamcoUS TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@bandainamcous Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/bandainamcous Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/BandaaiNamcoUS Twitch：http://www.twitch.tv/bandainamcous 主题：https://www.threads.com/@bandainamcous订阅我们的时事通讯！ - https://www.bandainamcoent.com/#signup
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
